mapper.select:
SELECT a.id, process_code, process_name, process_type, source, destination, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, b.user_name as create_name, c.user_name as update_name FROM m_operation_process a inner join sys_user b on a.create_by = b.id left join sys_user c on a.update_by = c.id
and a.id=#{id}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM m_operation_subprocess where process_code in
#{codes}

SELECT t.id, t.process_code, t.subprocess_code, t.subprocess_name, t.source, t.description, t.cargo_volume, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, b.user_name as create_name, c.user_name as update_name FROM m_operation_subprocess t inner join sys_user b on t.create_by = b.id left join sys_user c on t.update_by = c.id
and t.id=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO m_operation_process (id, process_code, process_name, process_type, source, destination, create_by, create_time) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{processCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{processName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{source,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{destination,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update:
UPDATE m_operation_process SET process_code=#{processCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, process_name=#{processName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, process_type=#{processType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, source=#{source,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, destination=#{destination,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by=#{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time=#{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
id=#{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM m_operation_process WHERE id in
#{ids}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO m_operation_subprocess (id, process_code, subprocess_code, SUBPROCESS_NAME, source, description, cargo_volume, create_by, create_time) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{processCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{subprocessCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subprocessName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{source,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{cargoVolume,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update:
UPDATE m_operation_subprocess SET process_code=#{processCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, subprocess_code=#{subprocessCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, subprocess_name=#{subprocessName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, source=#{source,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description=#{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cargo_volume=#{cargoVolume,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by=#{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time=#{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT max(subprocess_code) FROM m_operation_subprocess where process_code=#{code}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM m_operation_technology
process_codes
